creator: akelling@gmail.com
text:
I am also seeing this issue with KVM on OpenSUSE 42.1. I have also tried the same troubleshooting steps. 

My system information.

Repository: openSUSE-Leap-42.1-Update
Name: qemu-kvm
Version: 2.3.1-19.3
Arch: x86_64
Vendor: openSUSE
